contextBlurb: Idaho has 12 bills tracked in 2025–2026. 5 are already enacted. 3 offer incentives or exemptions.

legislation.title: Amends existing law to revise a sales tax exemption for data center equipment and to revise a property tax exemption for certain capital investments.
legislation.summary: TAXATION -- Amends existing law to revise a sales tax exemption for data center equipment and to revise a property tax exemption for certain capital investments.

legislation.title: Amends existing law to revise a sales tax exemption for data center equipment and to revise a certain property tax exemption for certain capital investments.
legislation.summary: TAXATION -- Amends existing law to revise a sales tax exemption for data center equipment and to revise a certain property tax exemption for certain capital investments.

legislation.title: Amends existing law to revise a sales tax exemption for data center equipment and to revise a certain property tax exemption for certain capital investments.
legislation.summary: TAXATION -- Amends existing law to revise a sales tax exemption for data center equipment and to revise a certain property tax exemption for certain capital investments.

legislation.title: Adds to existing law to establish limitations on consumptive use of water for cooling certain data centers.
legislation.summary: DATA CENTERS -- Adds to existing law to establish limitations on consumptive use of water for cooling certain data centers.

legislation.title: Adds to existing law to establish provisions regarding generative artificial intelligence in public education.
legislation.summary: EDUCATION -- Adds to existing law to establish provisions regarding generative artificial intelligence in public education.

legislation.title: Adds to existing law to establish provisions regarding unbiased artificial intelligence in state government purchasing.
legislation.summary: PROCUREMENT -- Adds to existing law to establish provisions regarding unbiased artificial intelligence in state government purchasing.

legislation.title: Adds to existing law to establish the Conversational AI Safety Act.
legislation.summary: ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE -- Adds to existing law to establish the Conversational AI Safety Act.

legislation.title: Adds to existing law to establish provisions regarding the capture or use of biometric identifiers.
legislation.summary: BIOMETRIC IDENTIFIERS -- Adds to existing law to establish provisions regarding the capture or use of biometric identifiers.

legislation.title: Relates to the appropriation from the Idaho Millennium Income Fund for fiscal year 2027.
legislation.summary: APPROPRIATIONS -- MILLENNIUM INCOME FUND -- Relates to the appropriation from the Idaho Millennium Income Fund for fiscal year 2027.

legislation.title: Relates to the maintenance appropriation to the Constitutional Officers for fiscal year 2027.
legislation.summary: APPROPRIATIONS -- CONSTITUTIONAL OFFICERS -- Relates to the maintenance appropriation to the Constitutional Officers for fiscal year 2027.

legislation.title: Adds to existing law to require the use of AI to review administrative rules annually.
legislation.summary: RULES -- Adds to existing law to require the use of AI to review administrative rules annually.

legislation.title: Adds to existing law to establish the Idaho Rural Health Transformation Fund and the Rural Health Transformation Committee.
legislation.summary: RURAL HEALTH TRANSFORMATION -- Adds to existing law to establish the Idaho Rural Health Transformation Fund and the Rural Health Transformation Committee.
